name: Dadish 3D
short_description: He's a dad AND a radish. Dadish's kids are missing and he needs your help to find them! Explore an exciting world, face off with fast-food themed foes, and reunite Dadish with his missing children in this challenging 3D platforming adventure.
detailed_description:
He's a dad AND a radish. Dadish's kids are missing and he needs your help to find them!

After his children are lured away by dubious pop-up advertising, Dadish sets out to find them in his most exciting adventure yet. Explore an exciting world, face off with fast-food themed foes, and reunite Dadish with his missing children in this challenging 3D platforming adventure.

  • A challenging 3D platformer
  • Dialogue that is sort of funny
  • Ride on the back of a giant hamburger (who is also a criminal)
  • 50 cool levels to beat
  • 49 sassy baby radishes and one screechy Possum to find
  • Fast-food dudes that will try to kill you
  • Five big grumpy bosses
  • Experience the highs and lows of being a parent (who is also a radish)
  • I enjoy the soundtrack and I hope you do too
  • The graphics are great, I think
  • Collectable stars hidden in every stage
  • Unlock exciting secrets
  • Believe in yourself and follow your heart
